calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Assets Belonging To Trustee Of Decedent'S Revocable Estate.
Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Maring for and with Eduardo Combes. Ashley Combes also present.

Mr. Maring stated that there is no objection to the relief being requested, that he thinks the Decedent deeded the property out of the Trust to do a refinance, that there is a specific bequest in the Trust with regard to both properties and that they have a pour over will. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Assets Belonging to Trustee of Decedent's Revocable Estate (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)
